tool.name: airtable_update_record
tool.description: Update an existing record in an Airtable table by row index. Clicks on the specified row and updates field values.

parameters.name: row_index
parameters.description: Zero-based row index of the record to update (e.g. '0' for first row, '5' for sixth row)

parameters.name: field_values
parameters.description: JSON string of field:value pairs to update (e.g. '{"Status":"Done","Notes":"Updated by agent"}')
